# Italian Culinary Consortium International (ICC)

> The official international organisation promoting, protecting and connecting authentic Italian culinary culture, products and professionals worldwide.

ICC is a global non-profit body uniting chefs, producers, institutions and cultural ambassadors to safeguard the authenticity of Italian cuisine. We operate through international Chapters, an Academy, certifications, editorial publishing and cultural initiatives.

## Pages

- [About](/about): Mission, history and governance of the Consortium.
- [Chapters](/chapters): International Chapters and global network.
- [Leadership](/leadership): Board, council and ambassadors.
- [Academy](/academy): Education, training and certification programmes.
- [Initiatives](/initiatives): ICC Gusto, certifications and cultural projects.
- [Events](/events): International gatherings, galas and symposia.
- [News](/news): Editorial updates and announcements.
- [Magazine](/magazine): ICC Gusto — the Consortium's editorial magazine.
- [Podcasts](/podcasts): Conversations on Italian culinary culture.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photography from chapters, events and initiatives.
- [Membership](/membership): How to join the Consortium.
- [Partners](/partners): Founding members and institutional partners.
- [Contact](/contact): How to reach the Consortium.
